---
title: "Slides"
format: html
---

- Vector Deepdive
    - [Topological Relations](vector-deepdive-topological-rel.qmd){target="_blank"}
    - [DuckDB](vector-deepdive-duckdb.qmd){target="_blank"}
    - [Vector Deepdive Tasks](vector-deepdive-task.qmd)
- Raster Deepdive
    - [Raster data on disk](raster-deepdive-on-disk.qmd){target="_blank"}
    <!-- - [Tasks](raster-deepdive-task.qmd) -->

:::{.content-visible when-profile="dev"}


- Interpolation / Density Estimation
    - [Density Estimation](interpolation-density.qmd){target="_blank"}
    - [Interpolation Methods](interpolation-methods.qmd){target="_blank"}
    - [Tasks](interpolation-task.qmd)
- Network Centrality
    - [Network Centrality Tasks](network-centrality-task.qmd)
    - [Network Routing Tasks](network-routing-task.qmd)
- Movement Analysis I
    - [Tasks](movement-I-tasks.qmd)
- Movement Analysis II
    - [Tasks](movement-II-tasks.qmd)
:::
